category.scope_note: Air-source heat pump compliance comparison for space heating, cooling, and domestic hot water applications.

target_market_label.zh: 印度（BIS / BEE / 制冷剂规则）
target_market_label.zht: 印度（BIS / BEE / 制冷劑規則）

title.en: China-to-India Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入印度：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入印度：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Indian BIS compulsory certification where applicable, BEE star labelling for covered air-conditioner categories, refrigerant control rules, electrical safety, and evolving heat-pump-specific MEPS.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与印度适用BIS强制认证、部分空调类别BEE星级标签、制冷剂管制规则、电气安全以及正在演进的热泵专门MEPS要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與印度適用BIS強制認證、部分空調類別BEE星級標籤、制冷劑管制規則、電氣安全以及正在演進的熱泵專門MEPS要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, BIS licence determination, BEE registration approval, refrigerant-handling guidance, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and installers should verify current BIS quality-control orders, CRS scope, BEE schedules, refrigerant rules, and state installation requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、BIS许可证裁定、BEE注册批准、制冷剂处理指导、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行BIS质量控制令、CRS范围、BEE目录、制冷剂规则及邦级安装要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、BIS許可證裁定、BEE註冊批准、制冷劑處理指導、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行BIS品質控制令、CRS範圍、BEE目錄、制冷劑規則及邦級安裝要求。

answer_first.en: For India, the main gaps are BIS market-access checks for AC-type products and components, IS 1391/IS 302 electrical-safety evidence where applicable, BEE star labelling for covered air-conditioner categories, refrigerant controls under India's ODS rules and Kigali implementation, and a watch item for heat-pump-specific MEPS that are still evolving.
answer_first.zh: 进入印度的主要差距是：对空调型产品及部件进行BIS市场准入核查；在适用时提供IS 1391/IS 302电气安全证据；对纳入范围的空调类别满足BEE星级标签；遵守印度ODS规则及基加利修正案实施下的制冷剂管制；并持续关注仍在演进的热泵专门MEPS。
answer_first.zht: 進入印度的主要差距是：對空調型產品及部件進行BIS市場准入核查；在適用時提供IS 1391/IS 302電氣安全證據；對納入範圍的空調類別滿足BEE星級標籤；遵守印度ODS規則及基加利修正案實施下的制冷劑管制；並持續關注仍在演進的熱泵專門MEPS。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, ministry, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
